title: DoublePixelEyes
description: Makes new baby mobs' eyes two pixels.
body:
Makes new baby mobs' eyes two pixels, like most other mobs/previous baby models.

**FOR 26.1 SNAPSHOT+**

**_NOTE: The baby chicken's eyes are not changed here because even the regular chicken doesn't have double pixel eyes. This is not a bug, but I might make a version that somehow fixes this problem soon._** 

**If you find any issue with any of the retextures, please report the issue on the GitHub Issue tracker linked below.**
